title: Senior Software Engineer - BEL Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BEL Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
BEL Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
